creator: hselasky@c2i.net
text:
Hi,

The match rule for "subsystem" should be "DEVICE" and not interface.
Dump the USB device descriptor using usbconfig and make a rule matching those 
fields.

Also allow the interface numbers to be greater than 3.

Else your patch looks good.

Upload a new patch with the changes requested, and I'll see if I can get i 
committed.

--HPS
